Part.Source:
Event Start
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
&WizardSteps = new()
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Capa' &WizardStep.Title = 'Bem-Vindo' &WizardStep.Description = 'Bem-Vindo' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Geral' &WizardStep.Title = 'Geral' &WizardStep.Description = 'Geral' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Carga' &WizardStep.Title = 'Carga' &WizardStep.Description = 'Carga' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'ValorImp' &WizardStep.Title = 'Valor / Impostos' &WizardStep.Description = 'Valor / Impostos' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Modal' &WizardStep.Title = 'Modal /Fin' &WizardStep.Description = 'Modal /Fin' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Avancado' &WizardStep.Title = 'Avançado' &WizardStep.Description = 'Avançado' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
&WizardStep = new() &WizardStep.Code = !'Transmitir' &WizardStep.Title = 'Transmitir' &WizardStep.Description = 'Transmitir' &WizardSteps.Add(&WizardStep)
If &CurrentStep.IsEmpty() &CurrentStepAux = !'Capa' &WebSession.Remove(&Pgmname + !'_Data') Else &CurrentStepAux = &CurrentStep EndIf Do 'LoadWizardStepWC' StepTitles.Object = WizardStepsArrowWC.Create(&WizardSteps, &CurrentStepAux)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRetorno'
WWCte.Call()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'LoadWizardStepWC'
If 1=2
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Capa' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteCapa.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Geral' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteGeral.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Carga' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteCarga.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'ValorImp' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteValorImp.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Modal' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteModal.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Avancado' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteAvancado.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Transmitir' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteTransmitir.Create(&Pgmname + !'_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
Else Do Case Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Capa' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteCapa.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Geral' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteGeral.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Carga' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteCarga.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'ValorImp' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteValorImp.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Modal' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteModal.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Avancado' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteAvancado.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) Case &CurrentStepAux = !'Transmitir' WizardStepWC.Object = WPCteTransmitir.Create('WPCTE_Data', &PreviousStep, &GoingBack) EndCase EndIf
EndSub
